headline: Sabah Poverty Rate Double National Average at 19.4%
context: Department of Statistics reported Sabah poverty rate at 19.4% in 2025 more than double the national average of 8.2%.

cards.big: Sabah poverty rate at 19.4% is double the 8.2% national average
cards.sub: Interior districts of Tongod and Pitas record rates exceeding 45%

cards.big: 650,000 Sabahans live below the RM2,589 poverty line income threshold
cards.sub: Federal aid programmes reach only 38% of eligible households in rural Sabah

cards.big: Sabah received RM4.8 billion in federal development allocation in RMK-13
cards.sub: Per capita allocation is RM1,200 versus RM2,800 per capita for Selangor

cards.big: Child malnutrition in Sabah interior affects 22% of children under five
cards.sub: Rate worsened from 18% in 2020 despite federal food aid expansion

cards.big: Persistent poverty tests whether development funds reach the communities most in need
19.4% poverty — double the national rate — in a state that exports billions in resources annually.
